rulings.Case Title: GARY KASE et al VS. THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: ON ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, DECEMBER 26, 2013 IN DEPARTMENT 503, LINE 1, Defendant Foster Lumber Yard, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is continued on the court¿s own motion to January 8, 2014. Additionally, the court never received a courtesy copy of defendant¿s reply. Defendant must deliver one to Department 503. = (503/TLJ)
